transport.environment_policy: native runtime allowlist; no provider API keys inherited

paraphrased_evidence.A: Concrete statistics, an everyday eating scenario, and a personal recovery anecdote add texture, but insistent slogans, escalating comparisons, and repeated promises stretch a clear argument far beyond its natural length.
paraphrased_evidence.B: Specific examples and autobiographical material briefly enliven the case, yet the chapter repeatedly restates its premise through saleslike assurances, emphatic headings, and procedural reminders before closing with redundant summary bullets.

parsed.generic_mechanism: No differentiating mechanism is present: identical sequencing, emphasis, examples, repetition, and closing architecture create the same reading experience.
